Description: Fill whole torso area
How To: Stand or sit tall. Inhale through the nose, expanding belly, ribs, and chest in one smooth wave. Hold briefly, then exhale fully from top to bottom.

Description: Adds extra volume that stays put, almost pressurized
How To: Inhale through pursed lips with a subtle buzzing sensation. Hold at the top, feel the breath lock in place. Exhale slowly, keeping the pressure steady.

Description: Fans oxygen outward to sides, backs, ribs; diffuse spread
How To: Inhale through the nose. Exhale with a long soft Sss hiss, imagining the breath fanning out sideways into the ribs and back like a spreading mist.

Description: Drives breath straight down into lower belly / pelvic floor; directed plunge
How To: Touch your lower belly. Press your tongue to the top of the mouth and inhale, driving breath all the way down to your pelvic floor. Exhale gently.

Description: Pins oxygen into the upper ribs and chest walls; sharp, tight squeeze
How To: Lift the ribs up and out before inhaling. Breathe into that lifted space, pinning breath into the upper chest walls. Exhale while keeping ribs lifted.

Description: Shoots a focused stream into the front of the lungs
How To: Part your teeth and lips slightly. Inhale through that narrow gap, sending a focused jet stream into the front of the lungs. Exhale gently.

Description: Locks breath at the base of the throat then drops it lower
How To: Swallow lightly to anchor the throat. Then inhale, feel the breath drop from that anchor straight down into the belly. Exhale from belly back up.

Description: Soft, full-body mist; pure breath; invisible wave
How To: Breathe so softly the breath feels like mist. No sound, no force. Imagine breathing in cloud. Let each breath be purer and lighter than the last.

Description: Concentrates oxygen into a single bright spot in the solar plexus
How To: Tighten your core slightly. Inhale with laser-like focus into one spot just above the navel. Feel oxygen concentrate there. Exhale slowly from that spot.

Description: Gentle swirl; starts a clockwise spiral from belly outward
How To: Inhale through the nose with a soft zh sound. Imagine the breath swirling clockwise from your belly outward in expanding rings. Exhale gently.

Description: Pushes a quick powerful burst into the mid-back
Cue: hard stop in throat, explosive burst
How To: Build pressure at the back of the throat. Release with a hard stop, an explosive burst, directing breath into the mid-back. Exhale fully.

Description: Pulls oxygen laterally across the entire ribcage
How To: Place hands on either side of your ribcage. Press the tongue to the palate and inhale, feeling breath sweep laterally across the ribs. Exhale.

Description: Floods the entire face, head, sinuses, then sinks into lungs
Cue: lip hum, stronger than hmm, full-face resonance
How To: Inhale through the nose. Exhale with a strong Mmm hum. Feel it flood your face and sinuses first, then sink down into the lungs.

Description: Opens a vertical highway from third eye down through sternum
How To: Breathe only through the nose. Imagine a vertical channel from forehead to sternum. Inhale along this highway top to bottom. Exhale upward.

Description: Forms a perfect round container in the belly that holds extra deep
How To: Round your belly like a bowl before inhaling. Breathe into that circular space and feel a perfect container form. Hold briefly, then exhale.

Description: Light static refill at the very top of the lungs
Cue: lip pop, quick top-up, like a cherry on top
How To: Take a normal inhale. At the very top, add a quick lip-pop burst of extra air into the uppermost part of the lungs. Exhale fully.

Description: Twists the breath downward in a spiral (deeper than J)
How To: Inhale through the nose. Exhale with a twisting corkscrew feeling downward, deeper and tighter than a simple spiral. Imagine a drill descending.

Description: Sends oxygen rolling down the spine like a slow waterfall
How To: Roll your tongue if possible and inhale through it. As you exhale, imagine a slow waterfall of breath rolling down the spine from neck to tailbone.

Description: Turns the spread from C into a thousand tiny threads reaching everywhere
How To: Inhale through the nose. Exhale with a very long fine Sss hiss, imagining the breath splitting into thousands of tiny threads reaching everywhere.

Description: Delivers a pinpoint hit exactly where you aim it
How To: Pick a spot in your body. Inhale. On the exhale, tap the tongue to the roof of the mouth and feel a pinpoint of breath hit exactly that target.

Description: Creates a long vertical tube from throat all the way to pelvis
How To: Imagine a long tube from throat to pelvis. Inhale and feel the tube fill from top to bottom. Exhale slowly from bottom to top along the same tube.

Description: Buzzes a steady column right through the center of the torso
How To: Part the lips to teeth. Exhale with a steady Vvv buzz, feeling vibration form a column through the center of the torso. Inhale gently, repeat.

Description: Opens the entire back body like a giant hug from behind
How To: Purse the lips into a wide who shape. Inhale, feeling the entire back body open like arms spreading wide. Exhale, maintaining that open embrace.

Description: Splits oxygen into an X-shape; diagonal lines crossing at the heart
How To: Cross your hands on your chest. Inhale. On the exhale, imagine the breath splitting into diagonal lines crossing at the heart, forming an X.

Description: Pulls oxygen straight up the spine and out the crown
Cue: energizing, upward lift, bee with glide
How To: Inhale through the nose. Exhale with a gliding Y sound, feeling breath pull straight up the spine and exit through the crown of the head.

Description: Creates a low-frequency vibration that fills literally every cell
How To: Inhale slowly. Exhale with a low sustained buzzing drone. Feel it vibrate in the chest, belly, and limbs. Let the frequency deepen with each breath.
